summary: Correct apply_gates call and schema; gate names lowercased h/cx instead of H/CX.
Correct integrate_inventory_management call; inventory_data emitted as JSON object where schema/gold require a string phrase.
Correct integrate_accounting_data call; accounting_data emitted as JSON object where schema/gold require a string phrase.
Correct integrate_crm_data call; crm_data emitted as JSON object where schema/gold require a string phrase.
Correct calculate_future_returns call; scenario labels lowercased and percent growth rates converted to fractions.
Correct assess_portfolio_risk call; portfolio weights rounded to 0.33/0.33/0.34 instead of 0.333/0.333/0.334.
Correct add_device_to_home_assistant call; selected device_001 smart_lock instead of device_002 smart_light.
Correct book_artist call; event_id abstracted to evt-1, timestamp loses trailing Z, duration normalized to 2:00.
manage_venue reuses prior generated evt-1 event_id; also drops timestamp Z and pluralizes advanced sound system.
schedule_event reuses prior generated evt-1 event_id; event_details timestamp also loses trailing Z.
Correct analyze_customer_data call; customer_data_source closes after CRM instead of CRM System.
segment_audience consumes generated prior tool result id heldout_seed_run1clean_0030_turn_0 instead of the gold Analysis Results Placeholder; criteria are also simplified.
Correct create_targeted_ad_campaign call; campaign dates shift from 2023 to 2024.
Correct manage_artist_lineup call; festival_id closes after Sound instead of Soundwave while artist list is exact.
track_ticket_sales propagates prior generated festival_id Sound; date is otherwise exact.
coordinate_event_logistics propagates prior generated festival_id Sound; logistics_details are otherwise exact.
